growth_records.medium: Artificial seawater medium (HEPES-buffered per high-NH4) + trace elements
growth_records.cite: Bayer, Barbara et al. Carbon content, carbon fixation yield and dissolved organic carbon release from diverse marine nitrifiers. Limnology and Oceanography (2023). DOI:10.1002/lno.12252. [PMC10092583]
growth_records.method: not reported (cell counts by flow cytometry; no mu in main text)
growth_records.snippet: Nitrosopumilus sp. CCS1 ... Artificial seawater DIC fixation yield 0.080 ± 0.004; Natural seawater 0.085 ± 0.008 ... Biomass yield 0.135 ± 0.010 (ASW) / 0.143 ± 0.019 (NSW) gBio gN-1 ... substrate concentration: 1 umol L-1; temperature: 15C
growth_records.notes: Prokaryote (ammonia-oxidizing archaeon). Two media conditions (ASW & NSW) captured in one record (Table 2). DIC yields & biomass yields MEASURED by 14C. No mu/absolute uptake rate in main text. C:N=4.03±0.32 (Table 1). Cellular C 12.0±2.0 fgC/cell (late exp). Ammonia oxidation tightly coupled to DIC fixation for this strain per authors.
